channel.title: The Resonant Builders — Essays & Ideas
channel.description: Exploring how quantum-informed signal models can reshape the way we communicate — commercially, socially, and culturally.

item.title: The Great Thaw: Tuning into the Signal of Human Potential
item.description: We are living through the slow decay of digital platforms—but the frost is starting to melt. A 20-year journey into observer resonance, Hilbert Space vectors, and the iDIG protocol.

item.title: We Have a Communication Problem
item.description: The tools we use to communicate have outpaced our ability to make information meaningful. This is the problem iDIG was built to address.

item.title: How Quantum Social Science Unlocked iDIG
item.description: A walkthrough of how Hilbert Space vectors became the mathematical foundation for modeling communication signals in iDIG.

item.title: Why iDIG Needs to Be a Protocol, Not a Product
item.description: A conversation on why the most important version of iDIG is not an application but a shared protocol for surfacing resonance across any communication tool.

item.title: Signal in the Field: Resonance in Social Work
item.description: An exploration of how signal-driven alignment could help social workers and first responders connect the right support to the right person at the right moment.
